title: An Act amending the charter of the town of Bellingham to allow the Director of Finance to serve as the Town Accountant

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Soter of Bellingham, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 5564) of Michael J. Soter (by vote of the town) for legislation to amend the charter of the town of Bellingham to allow the director of finance to serve as the town accountant.  Municipalities and Regional Government.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

related_entities.name: the committee on Municipalities and Regional Government
committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 07/22/2026 from 10:00 AM-12:00 PM in A-1
